objetivo: shot-list golden nivel-100: passa TODOS os gates pre-credito (identity, dp, critique, style, structure, narrative, trait-carry, negative). Referencia canonica do que o prompt-smith deve produzir e fixture do interlock.
modelo: nano_banana_2 (Higgsfield CLI — generate create, refs via --image, sem Soul)
anchor_personagem: Same wizard character from the 3 reference images: short stout elderly mage, long flowing white beard, purple pointed wizard hat with a square gold buckle on the front, purple robe with lime-green trim (parallel yellow-green lines along edges), brown wide belt with square gold buckle, brown rustic boots, wooden twisted staff topped with a glowing purple crystal held in wooden claw. Hyper-casual mobile RPG cartoon style, saturated colors, bold outlines, soft shadows, vertical 9:16 frame.

cenas.intencao: Hook visual no frame 1: a vila esta sob ataque, ameaca revelada

cinematografia.grade_cor: saturated purple-and-gold grade, lifted blacks 3-8%, controlled highlights, warm amber shadows
cinematografia.grao: subtle stylized grain overlay, low intensity
cinematografia.luz: motivated golden hour side key from camera-left, 5600k, long contact shadows with soft falloff, rim separation
cinematografia.composicao: vertical 9:16, central safe-zone middle 60%, negative space top and bottom thirds
cinematografia.camera: one motivated slow push-in toward the horde
cinematografia.cor: purple-and-gold grade, lifted blacks 3-8%, controlled highlights, warm amber shadows palette

cenas.prompt: Subject: a horde of stylized fantasy monsters (blue gelatinous slime, small red dragon, green armored goblin with horns, pink toothed worm). Action: advancing toward camera mid-stride with physical weight and inertia, grounded contact shadows under each monster. Environment: medieval cartoon village under attack at golden hour, stone castle tower in background, light smoke on horizon. Composition: wide low-angle establishing shot, vertical 9:16, central safe-zone middle 60%, clean top and bottom reserved. Lighting: motivated golden hour side key from camera-left, 5600k, coherent contact shadows. Camera: 35mm equivalent, one motivated slow push-in. Color: purple-and-gold grade, controlled highlights, warm amber shadows. Rendering: hyper-casual mobile RPG cartoon style matching the 3 reference wizard images, saturated colors, bold outlines, visible surface texture — fabric weave, scuffed leather, wood grain, slime sheen — micro-variation under the light, tactile materials. No wizard in this frame yet, focus on threat reveal in frame 1.

cenas.prompt: Subject: same wizard from reference images standing tall facing camera, full body visible, staff planted on the ground beside him with purple crystal glowing softly. Action: victorious grounded hero pose with physical weight, boots planted, contact shadows anchoring him, gentle wind giving the cape believable inertia. Environment: saved medieval village and intact stone castle, sunrise sky with warm orange-pink gradient, defeated monsters faintly visible far in the distance. Composition: full-body central, vertical 9:16, central safe-zone middle 60%, deliberate clean top and bottom for later text overlay. Lighting: motivated sunrise warm key from camera-left with soft fill, coherent gentle contact shadows. Camera: 35mm equivalent, one motivated slow crane up. Color: purple-and-gold grade, controlled highlights, warm amber sunrise. Rendering: mobile cartoon RPG style, saturated colors, bold outlines, visible surface texture — beard fibers, woven fabric, leather scuff, wood grain, skin pores — micro-variation, tactile materials. No text overlay, no logo, no UI, clean hero shot with reserved space for the CTA.

gate_consistencia.criterio: personagem reconhecivelmente o mesmo em quantas das 6 cenas (chapeu+barba+robe+staff preservados)
gate_consistencia.regerar_cenas_falhas: 4/6 ou 3/6 - regerar apenas as cenas falhas com prompt mais especifico e as mesmas referencias
gate_consistencia.pausar_para_revisao: menos de 3/6 - pausar, revisar anchor/referencias com o usuario e nao gastar mais credito no escuro
